name: Polymyositis
description: Polymyositis is an immune-mediated inflammatory disease affecting skeletal muscles throughout the body, causing generalised weakness, muscle atrophy, and pain. It can be idiopathic or occur secondary to neoplasia or other immune-mediated diseases.
treatment_overview: Immunosuppressive therapy with prednisolone is the mainstay. Azathioprine is added for steroid-sparing effect. Underlying neoplasia must be ruled out and treated. Prognosis is variable.
prevention_tips: Exclude underlying neoplasia with thorough work-up
